evals.name: happy-path-on-plan-all-vectors
evals.prompt: How are we tracking against the plan?
evals.context: UoG baseline present: new_arr_target=2000000, nrr_assumption=1.10, grr_assumption=0.92. Actuals: closed_won_ytd=980000 (vs. pro-rata plan=1000000, delta=-2%, threshold=15%), current_nrr=1.09 (delta=-1pp, threshold=5pp), current_grr=0.91 (delta=-1pp, threshold=3pp). All three vectors within thresholds.
evals.expected_output: Skill produces three-vector tracking table. All three vectors show ON PLAN signal. No variance memo fired. Output labeled [DRAFT] with G1 qualification.

assertions.text: Output contains a three-vector tracking table with New logo ARR, Expansion NRR, and Retention GRR rows
All three vectors show ON PLAN or equivalent positive signal — no variance memo is produced
Output applies G1: forward-looking projection language is qualified (not presented as a commitment)
Output applies G6: data-as-of timestamp on CRM and CS platform reads

evals.name: nrr-variance-fires-variance-memo
evals.context: UoG baseline: nrr_assumption=1.10. Actuals: current_nrr=1.04 (delta=-6pp, threshold=5pp — threshold crossed). New logo and GRR are on plan.
evals.expected_output: Skill fires a variance memo for the NRR vector only. Variance memo contains: what diverged, quantified impact on year-end ARR, most likely explanatory factor with evidence source, and whether a replan is triggered.

assertions.text: Output fires a variance memo specifically for the NRR expansion vector (delta -6pp exceeds -5pp threshold)
Variance memo contains: what diverged, ARR impact estimate, most likely factor, and replan trigger assessment
Output does NOT fire variance memos for new logo ARR or GRR (these are within their thresholds)
Variance memo labels its explanatory factor with a data source tag [CRM ✓ live / CS Platform ✓ live / Inferred] — not presented as fact without attribution
Output applies G1: year-end ARR impact estimate is qualified as a projection, not a commitment

evals.name: degraded-no-uog-baseline-reporting-mode
evals.prompt: How are we tracking against plan?
evals.context: uog_baseline_path absent from company profile. HubSpot connected: closed_won_ytd=1200000. CS platform connected: nrr=1.08.
evals.expected_output: Skill declares baseline absent before showing any numbers, runs in reporting mode only (actuals without comparison), labels output accordingly, does not produce variance memos or threshold assessments.

assertions.text: Output declares UoG baseline absent using canonical language before showing any analysis
Output does NOT produce a three-vector comparison table with plan vs. actual columns (no baseline = no comparison)
Output reports actuals (closed_won_ytd, current NRR) without comparison to plan
Output applies [Confidence: Low] or equivalent with explicit reason (baseline absent)
